paragraphs: in an Autocracy: How Alexei Navalny’s

sections.section_name: Investigations Affected the Subsequent Career Paths of Investigated Russian Elites

paragraphs: How do anti-corruption investigations by the political opposition affect the subsequent career prospects of pro-regime elites? Theoretically, the effect of an investigation could go either way: the investigated officials might experience a dent in their careers relative to their peers or be arrested, as the regime sees them as a risk to its legitimacy. Alter- natively, an investigation by the political opposition might serve as a signal of loyalty to the autocrat, and result in a boost to the investigated official’s career. To test this question, I coded all 101 investigative videos that the Anti-Corruption Foundation of Russian activist and opposition politician Alexei Navalny published between 2015 and 2020, identifying 241 investigated individuals. The subsequent career paths of investi- gated individuals will be compared to the career paths of officials in a synthetic control group holding similar positions in the Russian government at the point an investigation was initially published by Navalny. The study will permit to test if the investigations had a positive or negative effect on the subsequent career paths of investigated pro- Putin elites, relative to their peers who were not investigated by Navalny.
